mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT boardId, userId, userName, category, title, viewCount, likeCount, commentCount, hidden, TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt FROM freeboard
ORDER BY CASE WHEN category = '공지' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, boardId DESC ) data ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}
SELECT boardId, userId, userName, category, title, content, viewCount, likeCount, commentCount, hidden, createdAt, updatedAt FROM freeboard WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO freeboard ( BOARDID, USERID, USERNAME, CATEGORY, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEWCOUNT, LIKECOUNT, COMMENTCOUNT, HIDDEN, CREATEDAT, UPDATEDAT ) VALUES ( freeBoard_seq.nextval, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
SELECT freeBoard_seq.currval FROM dual
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updatedAt = SYSDATE WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE freeboard SET viewCount = viewCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE freeboard SET likeCount = likeCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE freeboard SET likeCount = GREATEST(likeCount - 1, 0) WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE freeboard SET hidden = #{hidden} WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardId, title FROM freeboard WHERE boardId > #{boardId} AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY boardId ASC ) WHERE rownum = 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardId, title FROM freeboard WHERE boardId < #{boardId} AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY boardId DESC ) WHERE rownum = 1
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM freeboard ORDER BY createdAt DESC) WHERE rownum <= 5
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM freeboard ORDER BY likeCount DESC) WHERE rownum <= 5
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM freeboard ORDER BY commentCount DESC) WHERE rownum <= 5
SELECT * FROM freeboard WHERE reportCount > 0 ORDER BY reportCount DESC
